source.submodule: Returning objects - Static, nested and inner classes

topicTags: Returning objects - Static, nested and inner classes

content.problemStatement:
You are tasked with creating a simple calculator program in Java that can perform addition between two numbers. Create a class called Calculator with the following functionality:

- Calculator Class:
  - Implement a constructor to initialize data.
  - add(Calculator other): Adds the values of the two Calculator objects and returns the result as a new Calculator object.
- Main Function: Perform addition using the add method and display the result.

### Task
Write the methods of calculator class to display the addition.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat: First line contain two integers for addition using add method.
content.outputFormat: Print the result of addition on first line.
